creator: vd@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hmm, looks like this problem also exists in the ports tree, unrelated
to portsearch itself:

/usr/ports/archivers/py-librtfcomp# make generate-plist
===>   Generating temporary packing list              <---- it hangs
^C
/usr/ports/archivers/py-librtfcomp#

lets see how to fix it...
